allow: Bash(node -e "const {execSync} = require\('child_process'\); try { const r = execSync\('yarn install 2>&1', {encoding:'utf8', timeout:120000}\); console.log\(r\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.stdout\); console.log\(e.stderr\); }")

Bash(node -e "const {execSync} = require\('child_process'\); try { const r = execSync\('yarn add @vercel/analytics 2>&1', {encoding:'utf8', timeout:60000}\); console.log\(r.slice\(-1000\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(\(e.stdout||''\).slice\(-2000\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const {execSync} = require\('child_process'\); try { const r = execSync\('CI=false GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false yarn build 2>&1', {encoding:'utf8', timeout:120000}\); console.log\(r.slice\(-1500\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(\(e.stdout||''\).slice\(-3000\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const {execSync} = require\('child_process'\); try { const r = execSync\('yarn build 2>&1', {encoding:'utf8', timeout:120000, env: {...process.env, CI:'false', GENERATE_SOURCEMAP:'false'}}\); console.log\(r.slice\(-1500\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(\(e.stdout||''\).slice\(-3000\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const {execSync} = require\('child_process'\); try { const r = execSync\('yarn --cwd frontend add @vercel/speed-insights 2>&1', {encoding:'utf8', timeout:60000}\); console.log\(r.slice\(-500\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(\(e.stdout||''\).slice\(-1000\)\); }")
